epic.title: Odin's Spear TUI
epic.description: Full Ink-based admin TUI extracted into a standalone package with modular architecture, shared Fenrir logger, command palette, and complete tab content.

stories.title: Odin's Spear TUI: foundation — Ink setup, auto-startup, tab shell
Odin's Spear: extract into standalone package development/odins-spear with modular architecture
stories.note: Moves odins-spear.* out of frontend/scripts into development/odins-spear/. Wires @fenrir/logger alias. Must enumerate all odins-spear.* files before starting.

stories.note: PALETTE_COMMANDS registry, CommandPalette (/ key), HelpOverlay (? key), ResultsOverlay, ConfirmDialog.
